chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No.S-809 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ _ Dated: Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.25 and reply as at ‘A’. 3.For orders on CMA No.5427/2023. 4.For orders on CMA No.5428/2023. 5.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 1 June 2023. Petitioner: Muhammad Waqar ul Khan through Abdul Sattar Abbas through Khawaja Muhammad Azeem Respondents: Maha Haider through Muhammad Vawada O R D E R MOHAMMAD ABDUR RAHMAN, J. This is a Petition that was maintained under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 against an order dated 27 August 2022 passed by the Family Judge Karachi (South) in Family Suit No. 1132 of 2022. The matter was heard and reserved for order on 1 June 2023 and in the interim Mr. Muhammad Vawada, who is representing the Respondent, has informed that the Court that the Family Judge Karachi (South) has since passed a Judgement and Decree each dated 5 July 2023 in Family Suit No. 1132 of 2022 and which has rendered these proceedings as infructuous. This fact was subsequently confirmed by Khawaja Muhammad Azeem, the Counsel representing the Petitioner. In the facts and circumstances on account of the intervening Judgement and Decree each dated 5 July 2023 passed in Family Suit No. 1132 of 2022 by the Family Judge Karachi South, this Petition has been rendered infructuous and is dismissed with no order as to costs. JUDGE Karachi dated 22 August 2023
